neg_text: No pancakes, no Nutella. Strange taps in the bathtub and no rain shower at all…

title: Pleasant
pos_text: The location and the breakfast
neg_text: The cleaning. Room care. If you don't notify reception, they won't clean the room. The pillows. The bed.

title: Pleasant
pos_text: Good location. Clean room. Good sound insulation.
neg_text: Bad pillows. Cockroach in the room.

title: Poor hotel please choose another one I will not come back
pos_text: Iron and refrigerator in the room Location
neg_text:
1. Check-in after 4 p.m., if you want e.g. an hour earlier you pay 60 PLN!!!
2.The rooms are not cleaned. Towels are not changed. The hotel treats you as someone demanding instead of a customer and tells you to go to the reception (they don't answer the phone)and ask for cleaning and changing towels. Drama. As a result, he doesn't fulfill the request anyway and your room is a mess, there is no change of towels, liquids, or water. Terribly stupid SAVINGS. I complained about it at the reception desk, asking for a discount, but I was ignored and ignored.
3. Dark room, energy-saving lighting.
4. No bath foam. In the bathroom, there are stains above the mirror, the water pressure is so low (another SAVINGS)that it is impossible to use the shower. The plug is damaged, and the temperature cannot be adjusted with the thermostat 5. The hotel does not issue a receipt, so you have to ask several times.
6. Breakfast included in the price of PLN 75/person, so for a family PLN 215 or 300. Haha.
7. The floor is scratched, badly damaged in several places, with gaps so you could cut yourself, the wallpaper is peeled off. For renovation
Photos are misleading.
8. Staff (especially the gentleman on Thursday evening)
ignoring the customer. Rude, pompous.

title: Pleasant
pos_text: Excellent location - close to the Market Square and the train station.
neg_text: Very loud - trains, trams. It was difficult to stay with the window open, the only thing left was the air conditioning, which I don't like because it's difficult to sleep with and can cause respiratory problems. I usually turn it off, but it didn't work here. Additionally - damaged cistern.

title: So-so
pos_text: Location, bathroom, staff
neg_text: Old decor, peeling wallpaper on the walls, not very fresh smelling carpet

title: Na přespání dobré, ale rozhodně to nebyl prémiový pokoj.
pos_text: Perfektní polštáře a peřina, opravdu se tam spalo dobře. Čisto uklizeno :-)
neg_text: V popisu je výhled do zahrady, je to ale výhled do ulice před hotelem za kterou je městský park. Rozhodně nečekejte výhled do klidné tiché zahrady. Pokoj hned na proti výtahu není úplně premium, je tam hluk z chodby. Nebyla tam sprcha, ale taková malá vana, nevím proč dávají vany, špatně se tam leze a každý se v ní stejně sprchuje. Jako vana by to bylo vhodné pro dítě, ale pro ty není hotel určen.

title: Pleasant
neg_text:
Cleanliness of tables in the restaurant, and especially dirty tables and dishes outside. We had to clean the table ourselves to eat.
Breakfasts at Radisson used to be more varied, now they are 5/10. There were no bathing supplies in the bathroom, the room was only moderately prepared.

title: Rooms are great, one staff member needs to be replaced. The rest of the top
pos_text: The rooms are of a high standard, the only downside is the lack of a single bed
neg_text: Terrible service on the first day, phlegmatic receptionist who made you lose interest in life. What about after any interaction has started? Request for a single bed was not honored

title: Passable
pos_text:
Jacuzzi with cold water. Usually, a person wants to relax in hot water with bubbles, but here the temperature is like in a swimming pool.
Small selection for breakfast, e.g. one type of ham, if someone doesn't like a particular ham, they won't eat it anymore. The list of coffee capsules includes 10 items, of which 3 are available, two of which are not even on the list, so it is not known what strength they have.
We had a deluxe room... The mattress was terrible, soft and definitely needed replacing. Two nights and two mornings we woke up with back pain, completely sleepless, the toilet glass was completely nonsensical... I understand that it might be nice to watch my wife bathe while lying on the bed, but it's not very comfortable to sit on the toilet when another person can see us from the bed, the sound insulation of the rooms is terrible... When the lady next door was taking a shower, we couldn't hear the TV at all. I run a construction company and whoever built these rooms probably didn't do a good job. The pipes are completely without insulation, as are the walls between the rooms, and the floors and ceilings are also poorly insulated because you can hear everyone opening the curtains on a metal cord above the rad, which is another weak point. The curtains are so high that they are difficult to move, there should be a stick with a hook or something next to them so that you can grab the wheels and move them, not to mention that it would be enough to install electric curtains with a button. The hotel can probably afford such things, as another thing that strikes me as offensive is the irrationally high price of the products in the mini bar... Starting with the fact that in some five-star hotels, products that are already available in the bar are free of charge or, if they are paid, they are simply not available and are made to order. And here the fridge is so full that you can hardly put anything of your own in it and the price card is pushed on the top of the fridge for e.g. Peanuts with prices like Red Bull for 25 PLN or peanuts for 25 PLN. The only positive thing about staying at the hotel was the really nice and pleasant service. Gentlemen and ladies are always happy to help and always smiling.

title: Passable
pos_text: Intimate swimming pool, salt cave, cleanliness
neg_text: Room acoustics. We spent two nights there and two nights we didn't sleep. You can hear absolutely everything from other rooms. From conversations, through flushing the toilet or taking a bath. In addition, from time to time something humming would turn on. Air conditioning or a furnace? And on the second night the cleaning ladies started vacuuming before 8 a.m., which, given the acoustics, woke us up from bed because the sound was so loud that I thought someone was vacuuming in our room... A specific window. At a height of about 150 cm with a view of the wall.

title: Needs renovation or price reduction
pos_text: Location right next to the market square. Swimming pool.
neg_text:
The hotel is old and dark, and charges high fees for everything. Definitely not worth the price.
Breakfasts are terrible, scrambled eggs made from powder. Staff is very young and poorly trained.

title: Dark
pos_text:
Overall, the stay was quite good. Unfortunately, the pictures are somewhat misleading. It was not nearly as bright and friendly as it is portrayed here. It's rather oppressive. Rooms, lobby, corridors and also the spa area.
The only really positive thing was the beds. They were super comfortable.

title: First impression WOW! Thereafter: NEVER AGAIN!!!
pos_text: This hotel is a true classic – in the restaurant and foyer you can feel the charm of the good old days. The wellness area also impresses with great offers. The situation couldn't be better. The design and features take some getting used to, but are very memorable. The breakfast is very plentiful; The selection is limited, but the quality of the products is good. I spent my birthday there and received a fruit basket and a birthday greeting—a very nice gesture.
neg_text:
Unfortunately, I was not satisfied with my stay. The check-in process was very reserved and unfriendly – guests should have felt much more welcome!
The first room was a disaster: The air conditioner hummed so loudly that the bed vibrated all night. Directly behind our bed was the bathroom in the next room – as soon as the tap was turned on, we were awake. I have never experienced such noise, even in old houses.
Additionally, our safe had a loose connection and was therefore unusable. We reported this to reception – they promised to take care of it, but nothing happened. The first night was terrible. We've never stayed in such a noisy hotel before—it was more like a youth hostel.
The next morning we mentioned it again and luckily we quickly got a new room. As an apology, we were invited to breakfast. The gentleman at the reception was very friendly.
The new room was much quieter, and the air conditioning and safe worked perfectly. There was even a bathtub with a whirlpool function – but it was broken, which was almost amusing. 5*??? At least we were finally able to sleep well.
The wellness area is generally nice and the staff there are very friendly. However, you shouldn’t look too closely: A strip of ledge is missing at the pool for about ten meters – presumably fallen off and never repaired. The entire area looks dirty, and there is extensive mold on the ceiling, especially above the whirlpool. The dim light conceals the whole thing a little. Be careful in the whirlpool: The stone tiles are so chipped in some places that there is a risk of injury. In addition, the loungers in the pool area are rusting badly—we ruined our bathrobes.
By the way, when we checked out, we weren't asked how we liked our stay – which is unfortunately somewhat telling.

title: Correct
pos_text: Good location and nice roof terrace
neg_text: Terribly poor service, rooftop restaurant advertises with Michelin and there is a disaster. The waiters can't remember orders. I asked for the menu three times and then they said they didn't know if there would be a table for me. How can they not know such things!!! Besides, they don't see the customer, you have to follow them and argue. The biggest minus of this hotel!!!

title: The hotel does not live up to its 5 stars
pos_text:
The fruit selection at breakfast was outstanding.
The soundproof windows saved our night's sleep.
neg_text:
Hardly any bread selection at breakfast. There was only one!!! Salad and no cream cheese for breakfast. We would have expected more in a 5-star hotel.
In our room, we had the doorknob in our hand when closing the bathroom door and the window handle when opening the window! Without words...
Behind the armchairs in the room hadn't been cleaned for a long time.
What a shame!

title: Good location, friendly service and lovely cocktails! However, a peaceful spa moment is not guaranteed!
pos_text: Friendly staff and top location! The hotel's rooftop bar was cozy and had the best drinks, so I highly recommend the rooftop bar!
neg_text: SPA. Unfortunately, the spa level did not meet expectations for a 5-star hotel. The pool was full of people and families with children and there were only a few beds next to the pool, so we really couldn't fit in there and didn't get to swim on the first day. I think the spa's standard is lowered by the fact that people outside the hotel can also buy a visit for cheap. People also didn't shower before going into the pool.

title: TV only Polish and weak lighting
pos_text: Nice big room and exceptional bathroom and lovely pool. Staff was friendly and actually the stay was ok, but see below
neg_text:
1. dim lighting. For that price, there could also be light.
2. No decent international TV programs. Only Polish and Italian and RTL
3. loud short noises in the middle of the night
4. Only one blanket for 2

title: Pleasant
pos_text: The place is close to the center
neg_text: Late night noise from inside the hotel. I think they were moving stuff or something. We couldn't sleep.

title: Dissapointing - certainly not what I was expecting for the price I paid
pos_text:
The pool and spa area was nice .
Breakfast was nice and the staff were polite and helpful
neg_text: The curtains don’t close properly , they are on a wire. The shower is ridiculous , the hands free holder is rather low and the water flys out the screen area . The atmosphere is dark and aged in the room we were in - definite only a 3 star property . It needs a renovation, the paint on our ceiling was peeling and walls scuffed and marked . Terrible lighting

title: It was a rather pleasant stay.
pos_text: Beautiful location, great breakfast
neg_text: The hotel is very dark in its decor; it's somewhat unusual to be observed through the glass partition in the room while walking.

title: Pleasant
neg_text: Noise in the room, probably from some air conditioning system, and the noise from a jackhammer or impact drill all day long.

title: Historic hotel, cool decor
pos_text: Central location
neg_text: Breakfast was expensive

title: Never again in this hotel.
neg_text: The worst breakfast (or rather lack thereof) I've seen in a five-star hotel - not only was the selection very limited, but hot dishes were only brought at 7:22. Unfortunately we had to leave and hardly used anything. Breakfast from 07:00 When I reported that more than half of the dishes were missing, the lady at the reception said that she UNDERSTOOD. Nothing more than a simple SORRY. NEVER AGAIN PLATINUM PALACE BOUTIQUE HOTEL in Wroclaw.

Więc buczało jakbyśmy mieli traktor w pokoju nie do wytrzymania przez całą noc, a i tak w apartamencie było zimno! Jak na 5 gwiazdkowy hotel to jakaś porażka. A co zrobiła obsługa? Dali nam 20 zł rabatu na parking!!!!

title: Nie polecam nikomu tego hotelu.
pos_text: Pokoje były w miare nowoczesne i w miare czyste.
neg_text: Bardzo często korzystamy z hoteli, natomiast jeszcze nigdy nie spotkaliśmy tak złej obsługi. Brak kultury i poszanowania Klienta. Recepcja w zaden sposób nie zaregowała na zażalenia dotyczace obsługi. Śniadanie przyzwoite o ile ktos ma szczescie, bo przez wiekszosc czasu pojemniki sa puste. Łózko mialo byc duze dwuosobowe, okazaly sie zlaczone dwa pojedyncze i rozsuwaly sie przez cala noc. W kratkach wentylacyjnych cala noc byly dziwne odglosy, jakby gryzonie biegały. Nie polecam głównie ze wzgledu na obsługe. Pozdrawiam z tego miejsca Pania Adrianne z obslugi śniadaniowej, jeszcze nigdy nie spotkałem się z takim brakiem kultury.

title: Bad
neg_text:
Jesteśmy w tym hotelu raz na 3 miesiące ale po tej wizycie na pewno więcej nie przyjedziemy, obsługa z recepcji bez szacunku do gościa, najpierw trzeba czekać aż łaskawie ktoś pojedzie do recepcji, żeby później Pan z recepcji do którego jednocześnie się mówi patrzył w swój telefon i sobie przewijał - to jest obsługa na 5* hotel? Wysłaliśmy prośbę na booking o pokój tydzień przed wizytą, dopłaciliśmy dodatkowo za lepszy pokoj, żeby się okazało że dostaliśmy taki sam jak bez upgradu pokoju ostatnim Razem. Nigdy nie czułam się gorzej potraktowana w jakimkolwiek hotelu. Nie wspominając o śniadaniach na których nic nje było
Do jedzenia
- wykupiliśmy śniadanie na booking zeby okazało
Się że trzeba dokupić za jedną osoba? Rezerwacja pokoju na dwie osoby, a śniadanie na 1?

title: There is a lot to improve, which is a pity because the hotel is beautiful.
pos_text: Historic building
neg_text: Room not as booked. After reporting that we had booked another room with a large double bed, the gentleman at the reception said that the hotel was fully booked and there was nothing he could do. He also recommended that we could move the furniture ourselves and then we would have a double bed. Breakfast also leaves much to be desired. A coffee machine that kept breaking down. We were sitting right next to it and while eating breakfast the error message appeared several times. The employee tried to save the situation by "scooping up coffee beans with a spoon" every now and then. The breakfast room service was sluggish, the tables were not cleaned, the food selection and quality were, let's say, satisfactory. Nothing more.

title: Bad
pos_text: I advise against it... it seems nice, but they charge a 200 PLN deposit which they don't return, so add 200 PLN to the price and an additional 80 PLN for parking

title: Great expectations -> great disappointment
pos_text: The hotel seemed clean, the room was spacious and interestingly designed in a good way, the staff was pleasant and the Wi-Fi was fast.
neg_text: The hotel certainly does not correspond to the five-star category. Either excellent 3 stars or 4 stars to average. The first room we were given smelled extremely of cigarettes. The second room was absolutely fine, except for the water temperature, which was not hot enough even at maximum - the overall bathroom design is very unfortunate, as the shower area is not closed and water sprays out. As for the wellness, unfortunately it was one of the worst we've been to - no privacy and overall not cozy and poorly designed. Furthermore, parking is extremely expensive, even though the location in Wrocław is very far from the center. For dog walkers - an abnormally expensive fee for a dog (5 kg). Even in Switzerland, a five-star hotel in Geneva wasn't that expensive. I'm happy to pay for quality and a great wellness center, but this hotel doesn't match the price or the rating with its amenities.

title: Avoid this hotel
pos_text: Big, comfy room. Good location with green park
neg_text: Stuff has been non-professionally and non-friendly at all via check-in process. Without deposit I was declined to use restaurant during the weekend. Spa is fully booked with different events and gusts are not able to visit it.

title: Disappointed
pos_text: Clean, large rooms. Good location. Very decent SPA.
neg_text: Very incompetent service. Parking fee even if there is no space and you park under the barrier... Broken shower. In the rooms facing the street the noise of trams and cars is very disturbing... At the very beginning of breakfast the scrambled eggs and bacon were cold. In the evening, despite asking at the reception, no one came to serve the bar and the same thing happened to us in the SPA area - no staff? During the short period we were at the hotel, they tried to charge us extra fees twice for non-existent services. You have to constantly monitor what the staff is doing, which is why we are disappointed with our stay.

title: The hotel is good, but the service and organization are poor
pos_text: The appearance and equipment are a plus
neg_text:
The downside is organization. Starting with the parking lot, which can accommodate about 10 cars - unfortunately there was no space for us.
Then the reception, where we waited 10 minutes for anyone to show up.
The refrigerator in the room was out of order, and in the bathroom, the shower was not fully enclosed, and water was dripping into the middle of the room.
Additionally, when we wanted to use the wellness area, there was no hotel staff at the reception in this part. We found a note telling us to report to the main reception if we wanted to use the SPA. Unfortunately, no one answered at the reception, so we went to the reception physically. When we arrived, the lady was clearly surprised that we had come, as the card supposedly only concerned scheduled massages and treatments. So we went back and got the towels ourselves. It's a bit strange that there's no hotel staff in the sauna or jacuzzi area, if only for safety reasons.
Overall, the organization is quite chaotic and for a five-star hotel there are quite a few shortcomings.

title: Poor
pos_text: Location: spa area
neg_text: The parking fee of PLN 80 per day was a horror for the porter who scolded me right away for taking too long to collect the parking ticket. There are barely 2 coffee capsules in the room.Room delete like a little kitten noise from the bus depot opposite.

title: There is nothing special, there are no basic amenities
pos_text: Unfortunately, the room lacked basic equipment such as a kettle, coffee, tea... Which seems to be standard in 2+ hotels. The room itself was spacious, nothing fancy. No iron, ironing board. Smart TV also does not work. I've stayed in many better hotels with fewer stars.

title: Minimalism when it comes to 5 stars. Many hotels with a penny rating do a better job.
pos_text: Architecture
neg_text: Lighting in the room (no light in the room), cold water in the jacuzzi and pool, no kettle in the room.

title: Pleasant
neg_text: Cold water in the jacuzzi

title: Pleasant

The hotel was great, but the guests were a disaster.

Drinking and smoking in the relaxation area and by the pool.
And the hotel was very noisy at night.
Breakfast was very good, which is to be expected for 800 zloti for 6 breakfasts.

title: I expected more...

- very nice, helpful service
- cleanliness
- free access to a coffee machine with good coffee
neg_text:

- not very comfortable bed and pillows + very warm duvet, not suitable for the season
- the aquarium bathroom is ill-conceived: water floods the floor when taking a shower, only overhead lighting, which makes it difficult to apply makeup

Wielkie rozczarowanie, nie wrócimy.

title: Far too expensive, location very good. Not 5 stars. Unfortunately not recommended.
pos_text: Location was central in the city center. Friendly staff. Breakfast was okay.
neg_text: Was advertised with a swimming pool in the hotel, but has to be paid extra. Parking not included, must be paid extra. equipment Rooms are getting old. Room service bad. Rooms with minibar, but must be paid extra. Hotel more like 2 stars, not 5 stars.

title: Not worth the money, plenty of other options to choose from in Wroclaw.
pos_text: Location in Wroclaw, the facade of the building, good opening hours of the spa zone.
neg_text: The property is pretending to be a luxurious location with top notch service. Unfortunately, the furnishing is tired, starting with slow single elevator, through the carpets in the hall looking as if there was a water loss, with the furniture in rooms being just worn out and the bathroom shower leaking water and barely providing any proper stream to wash. The staff while trying their best also did not satisfy, the rooftop bar could not welcome us on an evening after rainy day as they did not wipe the tables clean and we were not allowed to sit in the restaurant part to have drinks. We went to a bar right next to the hotel where we sat outside on dry chairs and enjoyed the cooler air.

title: Dark, depressing concrete room
pos_text: Location
neg_text: The room was horrible. Bare concrete walls and ceiling. Dark floor and furnishings, little daylight and dim lighting, it was dark and depressing. It felt like an underground bunker or a crypt or something. Not the luxury 5 star romantic getaway we were looking for for our anniversary. We'd paid extra for a larger, nicer room and ended up with a room we didn't want to spend any time in! We left after the first night despite having paid in advance for two.

title: Not worth the noise.
pos_text: Special style. Bath and shower in the bathroom. Great roof terrace. German TV channels are available.
neg_text:
Extremely noisy hotel. We were woken up in the middle of the night by more than obscene noises from the guests next door. You really hear everything. Whether it's the clearing of dishes or the groans of other guests. It almost gave the impression that professional women were allowed to come and go as they pleased. Completely unbelievable and unpleasant.
The furnishings are intended to appear luxurious, but in many places they are slightly damaged or not functional.

title: not very successful
pos_text: location
neg_text:
Room 527 looks like a concrete shelter, it is cold, dark, the air conditioning is too loud, the lighting is too dim. The noise from the restaurant located on the roof is disturbing.
The bar has overpriced seats, uncomfortable seats, and reverberation (terrible acoustics). being the opposite of the club atmosphere.

title: Once and never again!
pos_text:
Beautiful spa area
Pleasant atmosphere
City center location
Suitable as a party location, but not as a hotel for sleeping.
neg_text:
5 stars ???
No soundproofing, no chance of sleeping.
Unique clairaudience.
Avoid the 5th floor when the weather is nice, as the disco area is on the 6th floor.
Moving tables and chairs seems to be a popular sport.
Noise level from compressors on the roof unbearable.
Thank God the room could be swapped.

title: Discomfort
pos_text: The location is undoubtedly an advantage
neg_text: Negative aspects - reception staff poorly oriented and poorly trained. One elevator is undoubtedly a big minus, long waiting times for the elevator, e.g. After using the pool, the elevator to level -1 arrives full and you have to wait for another one, and another one, and so on, up to 3 or 4 elevators until you manage to get on, which is not very comfortable after the pool when you are standing in the corridor in a bathrobe and freezing. The lighting in the room is very dim, of course suitable for a cozy evening but poor when using the room. The curtains hang on metal cords, which makes them very difficult to move; even the staff have trouble moving them. The bathroom has very poor lighting and there is no way to cover the bathroom windows, there are no blinds, curtains, or anything else, which makes it quite difficult to use the bathroom after dark when there is a tenement house with windows opposite, and it is uncomfortable when using the toilet or taking a shower.

title: Poor room was very dark and the glass screen for bathroom area is dangerous
pos_text: Breakfast was poor not enough space around the buffet area
neg_text:
Service area around breakfast buffet was crammed
Pool area in spa not supervised children treating spa like a play area

title: I recommend it to anyone who wants to spend a weekend
pos_text: Great location, very friendly staff, breakfast OK!
neg_text: beds too short

title: Too expensive, too weak.
neg_text: Value for money. The price is definitely overstated. Breakfast is completely not worth the price of 120 PLN/person. Not very cozy, outdated interior. The bathroom is like a tomb with a mirror that is too small.

title: Poor
neg_text: Service, request for the room to be the same as last time (this information was given a month before our departure), the gentleman told me to inform about the request before departure (the hotel did not even reply to my message), there was no heating in the room. Each time we were delighted with the service, this was our 5th stay this year, but the gentleman at the reception definitely spoiled the impression this time

title: Sleepless in Wrocław

neg_text: The air conditioning didn't work; the room was much too warm. We had to change rooms several times; it was too noisy outside because of humming containers under the windows, and the room was extremely noisy. Overall, we unfortunately hardly got any sleep.

title: Pleasant
pos_text: Overall I like this hotel: good location, interesting interior design.
neg_text:
Had reservations few times the rooms in reality are smaller and darker than on photos, which makes me feel frustrated.
This reservation it was heard very well everything happening on kitchen like in room, I think it is because of air conditioning.

title: Passable

Poor and very poor room decor, only basic toiletries in the bathroom, no iron. This is not what we expected from a 5-star hotel.
neg_text: Nice staff. Location

title: Location is good, but the hotel is not 5 stars in my opinion.
pos_text: The location
neg_text:
For a 5-star hotel, the room was very spartan!
There were no coffee or tea facilities, the bathroom is large but very illogically laid out, the lighting was also mediocre, and the bed was much too low and uncomfortable.

title: Pleasant
neg_text: waiters, very amateur behavior and service for a 5* hotel

title: We simply won't come back.
pos_text: We returned to the hotel because of the location, proximity to the guarded parking lot, the hotel design and the great breakfast and good service so far. remaining location and design of the hotel.
neg_text: Being in the hotel again, we were given a room that was worn out by time, we were treated as 1 person - 1 bathrobe, 1 set of towels, 1 slippers - we returned late so we gave up calling the room service. The last straw was the bathtub, which I gave up on in the morning when I remembered getting into it in the evening. Even my very capable husband had trouble, and I will add that there was no handle installed next to the bathtub, which is a requirement in facilities categorized below. When I passed this comment on to the receptionist I heard "the handles do not match the design of the building's owners"w-well, my hands are at my feet. And breakfast? I know many 4-star hotels of a much higher standard.

title: This hotel does not deserve 5*.
pos_text: I liked the building and the historic stairs inside. Great location.
neg_text: When I first wake up, the room is filled with battered furniture and a stained armchair. There is mold in the bathroom shower. The flush cistern is broken. The rain shower on the ceiling is in terrible condition. The carpets in the hallway are stained.The noise is terrifying, you can hear everything from the corridor. The elevator is terribly slow, better to take the stairs. Standard breakfast. I might even say it's a poor choice. After reporting my concerns, they changed us to a room with a higher standard. It was definitely quieter and larger. However, the shower was not without mold either.

title: Beautiful on the outside, needs renovation on the inside
pos_text: Location and beautiful building from the OUTSIDE
neg_text: The inside of the building needs refreshing. No sockets by the bed, no possibility of making a frosted glass in the bathroom. The curtains are difficult to open and close - these are probably the biggest disadvantages

title: A very successful stay
pos_text: Breakfast is average, location is ok
neg_text: Appearance of the rooms

title: Pleasant
pos_text: Very good SPA facility, very good location.
neg_text: Poor staff service, very poor Standard room equipment, no parking (very difficult to find a space). There are much better options in Wrocław at this price.

title: Pleasant
pos_text: Style, history of the object
neg_text: I chose the hotel because of the saunas and swimming pool to relax in the evening. The pool was cold and overcrowded, the jacuzzi had the same water - very cold, the dry sauna was broken, the wet one turned off after 5 minutes and never turned back on. No relaxation

title: The hotel does not live up to its rating.
pos_text: The only positive aspect I can mention is the spa – the pool and sauna were excellent.
neg_text:
First of all, one of the water bottles in the room was already opened when we checked in. The seal on the cap clearly indicated that the bottle had been opened, and it was filled to the brim with tap water.
After we took a bath, we couldn’t drain the water because the valve was broken. I had to deal with it myself, as we didn’t want to contact the hotel on our special day – we just wanted to relax.
In the double room, there was only one set of towels, bathrobes, and slippers. We had to request an additional set for the second guest.
We stayed on the second floor, and there was some kind of corporate event happening on the first floor, which made it very difficult to rest. The music was extremely loud. After midnight, we reported it to the reception, but the music only stopped closer to 1 a.m.

It felt more like a standard 4-star hotel located in an old historic building.

title: Viel zu teuer. Keine eigenen PP. Minibar zu Teuer.
pos_text:
Das Hotel war in der nähe vom Stadt Zentrum.
Der Checkin Verlief sehr Schnell.
Das Bett hätte etwas grösser sein können.
Die Bettwäsche waren sauber.
Das wir nur 2 Nächte da waren hat uns gereicht um zu erkennen das der Preis übberteuert ist.
(291€)
neg_text:
Die Duschbrause spritzte das wasser durch den raum, so war der boden am eingang vom bad immer nass.
Der Versteller von der badewanne war Defekt. So konnten wir nur mit tricks die badewanne benutzen.
Auf den Bilder vom Bad sehen sie Pflegeprodukte von Rituals. Dem war leider nicht so.
Es gab keine Hoteleigene PP. Wir musten auserhalb Parken.
Die Preise der Minibar waren Viel Teurer wie bei uns in der Schweiz.

title: Hotel 5* rozczarowujacy standardem.
pos_text: Super lokalizacja. Piekna, duza lazienka. Swietne sauny.
neg_text: Zimno w pokoju, poduszka jakby polowy wkladu nie bylo, jeden szampon, jeden zel pod prysznic do noclegu dla dwoch osob. Brak czajnika/zestawu do zaparzenia kawy. Woda w basenie i jacuzzi tak zimna ze nie da sie wejsc. Poplamione wykladziny na korytarzu.

title: Pleasant
pos_text: I had the pleasure of having breakfast at the hotel and I am very pleased! The choice of dishes is wide – fresh bread, delicious cheeses, cold meats, fruit, as well as warm options that were perfectly prepared. Everything is fresh and tasty, and the service is extremely polite and helpful. The pleasant atmosphere makes every morning start really well here. I definitely recommend it!
neg_text: The stay at the hotel was not entirely comfortable. The beds were too soft, which made sleeping on them uncomfortable and I woke up sore. It would definitely be nice to be able to choose firmer mattresses. Additionally, the prices in the hotel bar are definitely too high. This makes using the bar not a pleasant addition, but rather an unnecessary expense. The hotel has its advantages, but these issues need improvement.

title: Unfortunately, nothing out of the ordinary. Not worth 5 stars.
neg_text: The water in the sink did not drain completely. Our two complaints resulted in NOTHING. None of the employees contacted knew anything about the complaint. There was no apology either. The room was dark and not comfortable.

title: Passable
pos_text: Friendly service, tasty breakfasts but cold sausages and scrambled eggs
neg_text: Poor rooms, poor location but enormous noise from the street. When the trams are running, everything shakes and it's extremely loud. I have been to many properties located in the city center and the hotel has adequate soundproofing and windows. The beds are a disaster, the mattresses are soft, the pillows are small

title: Disappointing
pos_text: The connection
neg_text: Our room was extremely dark and overheated. Ventilation was difficult; the noise from the street was enormous.

title: Disappointing

neg_text:
I didn't like that they asked me to pay a deposit, this is the first time we've seen this.
I didn't like the fact that there was no receptionist at the spa, one of the bans didn't work, and the alarm buttons didn't work.

title: Passable
neg_text: The room is small and dark. Be careful in the parking lot. The parking attendant who was directing me to the parking lot did not warn me that there was a sharp curb there, as a result of which I damaged my car. When I pointed out to him that this curb was dangerous, he replied: "it is not."

title: Pleasant
neg_text:
Parking is available for an additional fee of PLN 80 per night.
In the advertisement it is marked as a standard holiday. 5 stars and unfortunately there was no mention of it, I only found out about it on site. It may not seem like a big deal, but with such service it should be included in the price of the accommodation so that the customer does not incur any additional costs.

title: Good hotel
pos_text: Large rooms with interesting interior, very good breakfast, very low price, even too low :) good hotel manager who promised to fix everything I didn't like about this stay on my next stay..
neg_text: The staff on the day I checked in, a room with windows overlooking the tram depot, but that's my subjective opinion and more related to the staff, because there are rooms with a good view... I recommend asking when you make a reservation to be given a room in the new building... we had a premium room..

title: Nice hotel but not for this price
pos_text: Exterior and hotel room
neg_text: Fitness and relaxation zone

title: Pleasant
pos_text: Overall, the hotel was very pleasant, with friendly service and nice decor.
neg_text: The heating in the room did not work, the room was very cold, after reporting it at the reception I was told that nothing could be done about it and that it is always cold in the new wing in winter. After another report, just after midnight, I was offered a room change. Breakfast some of the products were not fresh.

title: Not a 5* hotel
pos_text: Very good breakfast and delicious food in the attached restaurant.
neg_text:
The safe was defective, and this was reported on the very first day. Nobody took care of it until we left.
There are only 2 hooks for bathrobes in the bathroom. There are no other hooks for drying towels. There is ample space available and the effort is minimal, with a great effect. The bathroom mirror stood in the window facing the main street and in the window frame. Soap dispensers and lotion dispensers were attached. Apart from the fact that it's all very impractical, you stand directly in front of the window at the washbasin. There is a roller blind intended to prevent people from seeing inside, but this then prevents them from seeing in the mirror.
There are also no hooks for hanging jackets, bags, etc. in the entire room.
Unfortunately, the room was not properly cleaned.
We tested the spa area. Here too, we must say that everything is cramped and there is no separate quiet zone.
The booked massage, however, was very good.
The staff were generally helpful, but often seemed awkward.
Overall, we have to say that the hotel does not have a 5-star level.

title: I don't recommend it.
pos_text: Location
neg_text: Dirt and stench in the room, the room had not been cleaned after the previous guests, the things were used.

title: Very poor
pos_text: The location is next to a park.
neg_text:
How does this place have five stars?!

We had an empty shower gel bottle, a big spill on the shelf and a broken phone so could not call reception. The room itself feels worn out, like an old corporate hotel that was never updated. The fake wood has lots of scrapes and worn bits and the bathroom feels incredibly dated. Finally, like all hotels that claim to be environmentally friendly only when it saves them money, they no longer provide bottles of water, but rather a fountain you share with the whole floor.

This was an incredibly disappointing stay. The last time I stay at a Radisson for sure.

title: Bad
neg_text: like there really is a hotel without opening windows??? living in a stench and stench and not having the opportunity to ventilate??? disgusting humus, they should close it and ban such a terrible hotel...

title: We will not return.
pos_text: The location is good.
neg_text:
There was no flow in the bathtub.
There was no soap for showering, they forgot to refill.
An outdated hotel and not at all 5 star level.

title: Bad
neg_text: The hotel and booking has no proper communication. I booked two adults and I child but upon the check in , the hotel record had only two adults and they were charging me for the extra bed ( fortunately the lady reception exceptionally gave the extra bed free of charge)and charged me a breakfast for my child of 19€ . I reported this to booking last 2nd of jan but until the booking has no reply about this. It was just annoying that the staffs during the breakfast and the lady in the reception kept on saying that I just reserved 2persons even i had the screen shots that we are three persons.

title: Bad
pos_text: Large room and clean. The restaurant has very good food and the wait is not long. Reception always on call. Very large selection on the breakfast menu.
neg_text: On Saturday, from 6 a.m., the construction crew was carrying out renovations and there was no sleep. It was terrible because it was very loud and when you come for a weekend to relax, you expect it to be like that in a 5-star hotel, but it was exactly the opposite. After reporting the situation at the reception, I received a reply that it was under renovation and they wouldn't do anything about it...

Il primo giorno in stanza non funzionava il tappo della vasca da bagno, un altro giorno la stanza non è stata pulita, ma l'aspetto più critico e la totale mancanza di servizio dallo staff in reception che, di fronte a svariate richieste, non ha mai provveduto tempestivamente al punto che abbiamo dovuto inviare parecchie email alla direzione che ci ha accordato un parziale rimborso.

Un'esperienza davvero deludente, soprattutto avendo scelto l'hotel per la spa.

There was dust in visible places, and in the bathroom there was dirty underwear from previous guests... We were given a new room that was even more dusty and dirty. There was limescale on the taps in the bathroom, a leaking bathtub faucet, and streaks on the tiles and walls that clearly hadn't been wiped down for a long time. Of course, no compensation or apology. The hotel looks nice at first glance, but that's all. I don't recommend it.

title: Nice facility - especially from the outside. main part. The rear part of the hotel is located almost in a park.
pos_text: Location ok - main building on a very fast road. But behind the main building, part of the hotel is almost in a park. A very large bed. The entrance markings are a bit difficult to see - I wasn't the only one who made a mistake and drove through the first gate and the entrance is in the second one. Both gates have barriers, so you have to enter the second one. Lots of mirrors - both in the bathroom and in the room.
neg_text: The additional fee for parking - PLN 80 per day - is a lot. The bed is large but the mattress is very, very soft - not everyone will like it. Faulty shower - open (no door) the cabin causes water to splash onto the part of the bathroom outside the cabin, directly under the toilet, despite the installed threshold, and then you have to walk on water to get to the toilet, unless you waste one towel on wiping up the water. For a 5-star hotel, the breakfast could be richer. The day before I was in a 4-star hotel and the breakfast was better than the one at the Platinum. To get from the main part where the restaurant is located to the back of the hotel you have to use two elevators or an elevator and stairs - it's a bit ill-conceived.

title: It was good, for a while.
pos_text: A truly high-class hotel. The building itself is beautiful, the interior refined in every detail. SPA included in the price, including a mini gym where you can do cardio training. The room was spacious, clean, and prepared for our arrival. The hotel - as a building - met our expectations. The room was comfortable and beautifully situated, but unfortunately it was winter.
neg_text:
Service. Unfortunately, apart from the fantastic butler who let us into the premises, the reception (which should be impeccable in a hotel of this class) leaves much to be desired. During my stay, upon check-in, the amount for the night was charged to my card (the money was debited from my account) plus PLN 200 deposit. When checking out, the lady at the reception informed me that they were unable to confirm the pre-authorization from the card and that I had to pay for the accommodation again - and the original authorization would be returned by the bank at some point. Therefore, the hotel stay cost me PLN 3,000 instead of PLN 1,500. Now I am waiting for the money to be refunded by the bank and for the hotel to refund the PLN 200 deposit. I don't know what would have happened if I hadn't had the extra 1,500 PLN to re-download the transaction. I hope that the issue of refunding the overpayment will be resolved by the bank/hotel. This situation has ruined all the pleasure I had staying at your hotel. The ladies at the reception unfortunately showed a lack of professionalism and understanding of me as a customer.

Additionally, a higher standard room, which we chose for a given season (autumn) wasn't the most pleasant, the glass walls in the entire room and the heat vents weren't able to heat up our room - the nights were cold and we couldn't live without the vents roaring all night long - Unfortunately...

Unfortunately, our reservation coincided with the organization of a mass event and on Friday we were unable to use the restaurant upon arrival. The restaurant was also closed on Saturday... generally - if you are a hotel guest and in the meantime there is a mass event - you are lower in the hierarchy of needs than a random person from a corporate event. Pity.

And yes, we are Europeans and used to our water here, however, this was just nasty. Also very bad noise cancellation, we could hear the neighbors from all sides even when they just coughed in their bed. Overall, I wouldn’t pick the hotel again as there are better places to stay in when visiting Wroclaw. As we booked last minute and spent most time exploring the city it was ok, but definitely not a 4* hotel and big improvements are needed.

neg_text:
This hotel has 4 stars, but it is not clear why. The room service leaves a lot to be desired; used glasses were neither cleaned nor replaced with clean ones, and the beds were only made once - we had booked for 4 nights.
When you get out of your car in the underground garage, you are “greeted” by a pungent smell of garbage.
The parking spaces in the underground garage are only suitable for very experienced SUV drivers, especially when the spaces are busy and you have to park between two cars.

We've learned to love the city of Wroclaw over the past few days and will be back for the legendary Christmas market at the latest, but this time we'll book a different hotel.

title: If someone likes sleeping in an ice hotel, this will be a good choice.
pos_text: Location. Breakfast ok.
neg_text: Well, yes, I chose the hotel based on repeated good experiences at the Qubus hotel in Krakow, which meets all 4* standards and is simply much better in every respect than the facility in Wrocław, in my opinion. The facility in Wrocław offers check-in from 3 p.m. What a surprise we had when we arrived at the hotel at 3:20 p.m. We saw the reception desk, hmm, honestly, in motels it is more representative than in the Qubus Hotel Wrocław, we proceed to check-in, unfortunately the room it turns out that the reception was not ready to offer us any coffee or anything while we were waiting for the room that was supposed to be waiting for us... okay, after a few minutes the room is ready... We dropped our luggage in the room and went into town to take care of things. After returning home, the room was cold, 18 degrees Celsius, no, it wasn't because of the open windows or something, it was just 18 degrees Celsius in the room... We set the airflow to 23 degrees and unfortunately, under the duvet, the airflow was terribly cold... so I had to turn it off, hide under the covers, put on a hat and try to sleep. In the morning, the temperature in the room was around 16 degrees. I didn't test the pool, even though this was one of the factors that determined my choice of hotel, but if it was also 16 degrees there, I preferred to skip it... Breakfast was okay, although compared to Qubus Kraków, it was poor... When we told the reception that the room temperature was 16 degrees, we were told that the heating season had not started yet (the temperature was 2 degrees at night). Well, generally speaking, just as I have always recommended the facility in Krakow, I will definitely advise against the facility in Wrocław because the location does not compensate for the rest, especially considering the price of less than PLN 700 per night.

neg_text:
Niestety mój pobyt w tym hotelu był dużym rozczarowaniem. Obsługa sprawia wrażenie niestety mało kompetentnej. Zgłosiłam problem z nieczystością w pokoju, jednak nie spotkało się to z żadną reakcją ani zainteresowaniem ze strony personelu.

Czystość pokoju pozostawia wiele do życzenia. Kiedy przypadkowo upuściłam pomadkę pod łóżko i zajrzałam pod nie, znalazłam tam nie tylko kurz, ale nawet kartę do apartamentu po poprzednich gościach. To pokazuje, że sprzątanie nie jest wykonywane dokładnie.

Problem pojawił się również przy próbie skorzystania z ekspresu, sytuacja była bardzo nieprzyjemna, gdy chciałam usiąść z kawą w holu zamiast iść z nią do pokoju. Pani z obsługi przewróciła na mnie oczami, co było bardzo nieprofesjonalne i sprawiło, że poczułam się niekomfortowo.

Kolejnym minusem jest kwestia parkingu. W udogodnieniach hotelu widnieje informacja o „prywatnym parkingu”, co może sugerować, że znajduje się on przy hotelu. Dopiero po dokonaniu rezerwacji doczytałam, że parking znajduje się około 500 metrów od obiektu i kosztuje aż 200 zł za weekend.

Niestety przez te wszystkie sytuacje mój pobyt nie był udany i trudno mi polecić to miejsce.

Fatalny hotel pod wieloma względami.
Po pierwsze, po intensywnym dniu zwiedzania Wrocławia, nie mogliśmy z żoną wziąć prysznica przed snem. Lodowata woda... Zgłoszone na recepcję ok. godz. 22. Najpierw złota rada, żebym przekręcił kurek tam gdzie czerwona kropka i poczekał dłużej. Nie skorzystałem i upierałem się, że wody ciepłej nie ma. Usłyszałem, że za chwilę ktoś przyjdzie sprawdzić. Oczywiście nikt nie przyszedł. Kolejny telefon wykonałem po 15 minutach i dowiedziałem się, że jest awaria tylko w moim pokoju i już jest naprawiane. Po 20 minutach zadzwoniłem po raz kolejny i usłyszałem, że już naprawione, woda ciepła jest. Sprawdzam - oczywiście nie ma. Dzwonię. "Woda będzie za 20-25 minut jak tylko boiler się nagrzeje". Tego już było za wiele. Oczywiście wiem, że woda w wielkim zapewne bojlerze nie nagrzeje się w 20 minut. Proszę o inny pokój. Ok, pan już sprawdza. Dzwoni po kilku minutach i mówi, że w całym hotelu są jeszcze dwa wolne pokoje, ale -uwaga- w nich jest ten sam problem z wodą, jak twierdzi. Już nie tylko w naszym pokoju. Zapachniało "ściemą". Koło 23 poszliśmy spać brudni.
To główny zarzut. O drobiazgach jak niedziałająca jedna z dwóch wind w hotelu i konieczności chodzenia po schodach na 3 piętro nie wspomnę. Cały hotel jeżdżący jedną windą spowodował, że bardzo długo trzeba było na nią czekać. Strata czasu.
Poza tym odrapane stare meble i drzwi w pokojach. Ale to są oczywiście drobiazgi.
A, jeszcze ściany w pokoju wybitnie nie dźwiękoszczelne. Sąsiadów z pokoju obok słychać jakby stali obok w naszym pokoju, a chrapiący sąsiad jakby spał z nami w łóżku.

title: Paid full price to stay in a building site!!!!!
pos_text: Location is excellent, 100 yes from main square.
neg_text:
Renovation work being carried out, we were only notified of this 24 hours before departure & were given a room which was on the same floor as the work being done, first two days were OK but third day we were woken up at 9am by a very loud drilling noise which was unbearable, we phoned to complain to see if they could get it stopped but we were told no, noise continued. We phoned again & they offered to move rooms, we accepted but couldn't understand why they didn't give us that room in the first place away from the work area, when we asked we were told they had lots of rooms away from the work. Not quite the relaxing few days away we were expecting.
The room we were given was much better but not 100% finished, there was bare concrete/ reinforcing showing in the ceiling & capped off pipes for a radiator sticking through the wall, not ideal.
Staff weren't particularly helpful, customer service goes a long way & they would do well to remember that, we were given two complimentary drink vouchers as an apology but when we used them we had to pay 1zl so they weren't complimentary, not a lot of money I know but considering they were given as an apology you'd think they'd have waved it.
The whole thing just made me even more annoyed because it could have been so much better with a little forethought.
Don't stay here until the renovations are complete.

title: If you want to get any sleep at all DO NOT STAY at this hotel!
pos_text: Pleasant staff, great location, good breakfast
neg_text:
Extremely loud outside! Did not get any sleep the 2 nights we stayed there. Extremely loud cars and motorcycles racing all night long starting at 7 pm (1900) I swear they were going back and forth on the street in front of us all night and along with that the people in the bar near us were extremely loud all night long. There is no air in the room, we had one window open to get air, we closed it because of all this of the noise, it didnt quiet the noise and our room got extremely hot and stuffy. The noise did not stop until 7 am. The pillows were ridiculous, one pillow per person and they were as flat as a pancake when you laid your head on them.
The elevator is old, there’s a big dent in the doors, sometimes it would not open or close completely., we had to help it!

title: Wrocław is a beautiful city, but staying in this hotel spoiled the good impression.
pos_text: Breakfast is one big disaster! We ate three breakfasts, so we have a comparison. Every time it was the same and what was supposed to be warm - scrambled eggs and sausages - was cold. I don't even want to mention it.
neg_text: I didn't like practically everything. From the deception that the hotel has parking, when in fact it does not have any parking, through a room with damaged windows, to a hopeless breakfast and unpleasant service.

title: Very poor

neg_text: The room is dark, the windows are from another era, the furniture is painted, the paint has worn off after washing, in some places it's ugly and gloomy, like in a scary mansion, the windows can't be opened because downstairs there are guests sitting and talking until 2 a.m. and the echo carries, tuned vehicles drive down the street, you can't go to sleep, it's just a scary mansion, only there are no ghosts.

Clearly overpriced accommodation. Don't stay here.

title: Compared to other 4-star hotels, this one performed very poorly.

neg_text: No air conditioning, instead a small fan, at 30 degrees. it didn't help much. Musty smell in the room.In the bathroom, the shower tray is sagging, the cistern is cracked, and the shelf under the mirror is poorly hung.Be careful, the elevator broke down once during our stay, /we lived on the 3rd floor/ Breakfast was very sparse, the absolute minimum.

title: Worst hotel in a long time
pos_text:
Breakfast was very tasty with freshly prepared scrambled eggs. The staff here were also very courteous.
The proximity to the city center is great.
neg_text:
The journey was difficult because the alleged parking spaces do not exist. Eight pieces for the entire hotel means we got nothing. Unfortunately, I only found out after booking.
The lady at the reception was unfriendly and spoke poor English and no German at all, which made communication difficult.
It's best to use the elevator only in an emergency, but it's still better than your room.
We were accommodated under the roof. It was uncomfortably warm, but the noise outside made it impossible to open a window. Every door squeaked, the beds creaked. We both had sore backs the next day; it was the most restless night of our entire vacation.
The bathroom is in keeping with the hotel, but the shower is too small for an adult and the water pressure is terrible.
There was also a useless television.

title: Location very good for Wrocław, service rather poor.
pos_text: The location directly behind the market square is excellent!
neg_text: Our room was very, very small. The open suitcase had to be laid out on the floor due to lack of space. Furthermore, the hotel was fully booked and there was only one working coffee machine at the breakfast buffet. A queue of 10 people formed, who waited at least 10 minutes to be able to get a coffee. The room was not cleaned or the beds made. When we inquired, we were told that we should have mentioned this at check-in. However, we were not informed of that. Given the high price paid, an uncleaned room is unacceptable!

title: NOT MY FAVORITE
pos_text: Delicious and rich breakfast. During my 3 nights I wasn't able to try everything. Very good coffee. Tasty food in the restaurant. Friendly reception staff and very professional in the restaurant. Hotel in the center of the Old Town - close to everything. Swimming pool and jacuzzi on site and possibility of using spa treatments. Night security guard (older man) very empathetic, polite and helpful. Water in dispensers on each floor instead of bottles - a very nice and eco-friendly idea. Comfortable beds. The room has a fridge and a balcony. Low price for the standard and location.
neg_text: A 100 PLN voucher to be used in the hotel restaurant does not compensate for the mess and dirt that was in the room. Night lamps - layer of dust. Contacts - last washed half a year ago. The bathroom is full of hair from the previous tenants. Pubic hair in the bidet. YUCK!!! Pieces of glass in the bedsheets. After reporting the problem - it was not fixed. The bed linen was not changed. The hair remained. After another intervention - the bathroom is so-so. The bedding is still the same and it wasn't even laid out as part of the service. These are not 4-star hotel standards. The water in the pool, which is supposed to be recreational, is freezing cold. It's definitely not 27 degrees as it says on the board. The jacuzzi is dirty - you can see it by the color of the foam. As part of the training, I suggest sending employees to Qubus in Krakow or Gdansk. There, 4 stars mean a 4-star standard, not a low-quality motel like in Wrocław. Never again. I do not recommend it.

title: I expected more from Qubus 4*..
pos_text: The location is definitely a plus, very close to everything. The room was clean, tidy, warm and quiet.
neg_text: The food, from the restaurant to the breakfast which was included in the price - was a disaster. A 4-star hotel, we assumed that the food would be first class. For dinner we ordered (on our own) ramen with duck (the duck was brown, it should have been pink, the broth tasted like water with a few drops of magic, raw carrots and mushrooms. I specifically called the waitress to witness that the carrot I bit into was crunchy because it was raw. A dish for PLN 49, completely tasteless. The żurek soup tasted and smelled like mushroom soup, and the waitress confirmed that she could smell the mushrooms :) Breakfast? - dried hams, hard cheeses, scrambled eggs made from powder (100%). Even the tea had no taste (unknown brand, probably the cheapest). Overall, the kitchen is a disaster. The ladies at the reception were unfortunately not from Poland, many things were not understandable to them… Moreover, the swimming pool and jacuzzi are closed, which we only find out after paying for the reservation, which is very poor.

title: Comfort, professionalism and hospitality at the highest level
pos_text:
Staying at this hotel was a pure pleasure. The check-in process was completely seamless, and the reception staff deserve a huge shout-out – they were incredibly kind, always helpful, smiling, and absolutely professional. It was clear that they were in the right place and were able to create an atmosphere in which the guest felt at ease, without unnecessary distance or looking down on them.
The entire facility is very neat and spotlessly clean, and the amenities available are of a high standard. The room was well-arranged, clean and fully equipped - from slippers and bathrobes to a complete set of toiletries in the bathroom. Everything refined down to the smallest detail.
The breakfasts were delicious, varied and regularly replenished, so everyone could find something for themselves. This stay was one of the nicest and most comfortable hotel experiences we have ever had. - we will definitely come back here again.

title: More pros than cons, although nothing groundbreaking.
pos_text: The facility is worth recommending, not only because of the obvious advantage of its location. At Scandic, a certain level is generally guaranteed: the good and varied breakfast was not much worse than what I know from the Scandinavian hotels of this chain, and in terms of comfort, finishing and bathroom equipment it was perhaps even better. The clever layout of the room deserves praise. An additional plus for the helpfulness of the staff - we checked in without any problems, although it was technically over an hour before the scheduled check-in time.
neg_text: The main problem: the promised soundproofing is unfortunately a lie. You can hear quite a lot from the busy Piłsudskiego Street: from accelerating cars to all possible sounds of trams (which have a stop right in front of the window) there were loud conversations and laughter of passers-by. Room decor is a more subjective thing, but I admit that the yellowish wallpaper, which looked like it hadn't been renovated in decades, put me in a rather depressing mood. Sleeping was not made easier by the pillows being too soft: to quote his wife, "to get a good night's sleep, you need pillows that you can rest your head on, not ones you sink into."

title: Exceptional
pos_text: The hotel is located in the center of the Old Town, within easy walking distance of the train station. Very close to the market square. A very functional room with very good lighting (this area is often lacking in hotels) , with a fridge, in the bathroom a big plus too many hangers and space to put cosmetic bags (often in hotels there is one hanger and the cosmetic bag has to stand on the ground, but here it is not). I know the hotel also has newly renovated rooms, but our room was one of the older ones, but it really had everything we needed. I like that instead of plastic water bottles in the rooms, there is a dispenser with sparkling and still water and a reusable, lockable carafe in the hallway. I like that there are dispensers with washing gel in the bathroom instead of mini cosmetics. A very good idea that room cleaning is at the guest's request. Breakfasts in the restaurant are delicious and varied. The hotel staff were very nice and helpful. We didn't use the swimming pool/fitness area because the hotel was currently renovating it, but we received information that such renovation was taking place at the booking stage.

The entire hotel is very well-kept, everywhere is clean and aesthetically pleasing.
Location wise, everything is within walking distance
neg_text:
When choosing this hotel, I was guided by the option of a swimming pool and jacuzzi. Unfortunately, if someone wants to warm up in the jacuzzi after a long day, there is no such option because the water in the jacuzzi is the temperature of a swimming pool. It is constructed in such a way that water from the pool overflows into the jacuzzi. If I had known this, I don't know if I would have chosen this hotel because it was crucial for me as I am not a fan of saunas.
Another issue is the lighting in the rooms... Unfortunately, if someone wants to get ready to go out after sunset, it is very troublesome because despite turning on all possible lights, the room is still dark... And there are a lot of shadows.
As a mood option it's very nice because this creates a cozy evening mood. However, for me it was definitely too dark... when I wanted to reach for clothes from the closet, I had to use my phone's flashlight to see what I was reaching for, and when it comes to makeup, unfortunately, in the semi-darkness and full of shadows, I couldn't see anything. This is a curiosity for women.

neg_text:
Everything in the room is controlled by a tablet, in the first room we went in the tablet did not work properly so we had no air conditioning and we were extremely hot in the night. The staff were very helpful and we changed rooms which was better. The air conditioning definitely worked better (especially on night 3) however the bathroom underfloor heating didn't work in either room meaning the floor of the toilet and sink area stayed wet too.

title: Excellent staff, modern, central hotel but poor sound insulation for Friday DJ sets.
pos_text:
Modern and nicely designed hotel with very friendly, supportive and professional staff. Central location and paid parking on site - which
made arrival very convenient. Good communication on the phone too.
neg_text: What put a dent in the one night stay was the Friday DJ set (organized by the hotel itself) that ended at 22.00. We had a room on the 3rd floor with windows facing the hotels yard and the DJ set was so loud, that even with closed windows you could just hear loud music in the room. Not just the bass even, the set. As someone who was looking to rest up in the evening after the day of travel - needles to say I was upset about but a) too tired to go downstairs and make this my problem b) the set wouldn’t be stopped just because one person can’t rest up. I informed reception next day that it really wasn’t ok.

title: Perfect for a weekend stay in Wrocław
pos_text: Very clean rooms. An incredibly comfortable mattress to sleep on. Blackout curtains - they do not let any light through, so if you are a light sleeper, you don't have to worry. Fresh, fragrant bedding. Clean and spacious (although not large) bathroom, fully equipped - towels, cosmetics, washing gel, shampoo and a set for women (this is a huge plus!). Coffee, tea and chocolate available 24/7 downstairs in the lobby. The decor of the entire hotel is well thought out, very aesthetic, and pleasing to the eye. The location is a huge plus, right in the center of the city.
neg_text: If someone is a sensitive sleeper, it is worth asking for a room at the end of the corridor, with a window overlooking the courtyard. It was our first time at Puro and we got a room with a window facing the street, and since our stay was on a weekend, we could hear all the parties, garbage trucks, people returning from parties in the morning, and people talking in the hotel corridor at night. The price of the hotel parking lot does not encourage its use. A few steps from the hotel there is the NFM parking lot, underground, but cheaper. The prices at the bar downstairs by the hotel reception are high, not matching the room prices, and they also add a commission for up to two drinks. There was no information about this on the menu or before entering the card into the terminal. I realized it after the load. There is no fridge in the lowest standard rooms. For a short, weekend stay this place is absolutely fine.

The hotel room was generally quite cold; despite setting the temperature to 25 degrees, it didn't even exceed 21. The air conditioning was so loud that we had to turn it off at night, which caused the temperature to drop to 18-19 degrees in the morning. The rooms were not soundproofed, conversations from the next room and in the corridor were clearly audible. A few drawbacks, e.g. the toilet flush not fully working, the door to the room not always opening properly, the shower head in the bathtub covered in scale and flooding the bathroom, the shower head in the swimming pool not working. No kettle in the room.
Breakfast is definitely not worth the price and the coffee is from a capsule machine.

title: Excellent central place
pos_text: The location is especially good - the old town is very close, and you can actually see the Bridge of Penitents from some rooms! Rooms are comfortable and facilities are good. Especially liked the spa, which admittedly was enhanced by us having it to ourselves. As an extra nice touch the hotel has its own Wroclaw Dwarf as well!

title: Very good
pos_text:
The hotel is a short walk from the main square, which is a big advantage. They were very pleasant at the reception. Our room was modern, medium sized. You can refill your water for free in the hallway at any time (incl. soda) from the vending machine.
We visited the wellness center in the evening. We ended up using everything the hotel had to offer, but perfection was lacking in fine-tuning the details.
You can also swim in the pool, but the water was very cold.
The hot tub is in the corner of the pool, ideally for 4 people, so you have to be lucky to get in. It was pleasant and the water was warm.
The sauna is right next to the pool, it is very small, max. for 4 people. Because of its location, people go there in swimsuits.
It's a shame that there are almost no storage spaces or hangers in this one large room. There are only 3 chairs to relax, that's really not enough (but I understand - there's no room there).
The advantage is that there is a water dispenser, towels and possibly spare slippers.
The overall impression of the wellness center depends a lot on how many other people you meet there.
I have to praise the breakfast a lot - a large selection, you can also make fresh juice, good coffee, there is a waffle machine and I recommend trying the cheeses, they are very good.
neg_text:
I would have reservations about the non-functioning safe (but we didn't address it), the bed mattress is very soft and we expected that there would be cream/body lotion available in the bathroom (there was only liquid soap/shower gel). Otherwise, everything you need is here.
The wellness area is smaller and everything is in one place - don't expect privacy or comfort here unless you're very lucky.

pos_text: Overall, the hotel was nice, but not very good.
neg_text:
1. I think that for this price (I paid PLN 350 per night - I was at the hotel from 3 p.m. to 7 a.m.) parking and a swimming pool should be included in the price
2. Unfortunately, there was a party above my room until 1 a.m. The staff did not react, although the party often moved to the corridor and there was shouting and slamming of doors 😥 3. Minor shortcomings include a broken shower cabin door and the TV not being turned on via the remote control (tolerable). 😁 4. The worst part of my stay was the morning surprise during settlement. The lady at the reception asked if I had used the bar in the fridge! Since there was something there, I assumed that the hotel staff knew how to take care of the customer and it was a treat. Nothing could be further from the truth. The receptionist added up my bill and charged me over 100 PLN (she added it up on a piece of paper, without a receipt)! I guess you should also charge for toilet paper, tea, soap, etc. If you are going to engage in such "fraud", it would be worth informing the customer that what is in the fridge is paid for! 😥😥😥 Overall impression. Nice hotel, although too focused on profit! I understand that times are hard, but to this extent?

When I pointed out at checkout that a kettle was missing, the friendly receptionist informed me that they could have provided both milk and a kettle upon request.
Unfortunately, there was no prior indication of this, for example in a welcome letter or at check-in. Comfortable second cushions for leaning against, a notepad and pen were also missing; in fact, a welcome folder, perhaps with some tips about the city, was completely absent. These are the kinds of details that should be standard in a hotel that calls itself the most luxurious in Wrocław. Unfortunately, this gives the impression that it was done without care.

The scrambled eggs looked as if they had been vomited, the sausages and hot dogs were dripping with grease, and the pastry looked old. When I tried to pour juice, colored water came out. Only the bread and fruit were quite okay. Additionally, there are free elevators, for which the wait can be up to 5 minutes during busy hours. My wife was also hit by the elevator door, which apparently did not have a working sensor - she suffered a bruise on her hand and the phone she was holding flew in an arc to the floor. The entrance to the hotel is terrible, and the location is such that you have to drive everywhere anyway. I do not recommend this hotel unless you are only interested in a comfortable bed.

Ausgegeben ist die Straße als Verkehrsberuhigt. Als Hotelbesitzer würde ich mich dafür einsetzen, daß die Gäste ab spätestens 2 Uhr schlafen können. Vom Freitag zum Samstag ging der Lärm bis 4 Uhr morgens.
Desweiteren müsste der Frühstücksbetrieb überdacht werden. Es kann nicht sein, das nur eine Person sich um alles alleine kümmern muss. Platten nachlegen, Wasser bei den Kaffeemaschinen auffüllen, abwaschen, Eier machen, abräumen usw. (Ich bin selber Hotelfachfrau)
Wenn man weiß, daß das Hotel voll ist, müsste eine Person permanent vor Ort sein.
Parklatz: über 15 Euro täglich, ist schon für diesen Parkplatz sportlich. Nachdem wir mitbekommen haben, daß immer ein Mitarbeiter zum Parkplatz mitbekommen muss, haben wir uns gar nicht getraut auf meinen Rollstuhl zuzugreifen. Es wäre schön, wenn beeinträchtigte Personen permanent einen Schlüssel für den Parkplatz hätten.
In 2-3 Jahren, möchten wir gern mit unseren Kindern und vorallem unserem Enkelkind nochmal nach Breslau kommen.
Wir würden gern wieder bei Ihnen einchecken aber nur wenn das Problem mit dem Lärm bis dahin geklärt ist.

title: Pleasant
pos_text:
The reception service was very nice both during check-in and check-out.
Water dispensers in the hallways and water carafes in the rooms are a good idea.
As part of the reservation, we requested an extra bed for a child. However, on the day of our arrival there were no more extra beds available and the hotel, as compensation, checked us into a larger room with a sofa bed. It was a very pleasant surprise.
Very good location.
neg_text:
The hotel employs too few people (or insufficiently trained) in relation to the number of guests. During breakfast, the staff was unable to clean the tables on a regular basis. Some tables were dirty for 10-15 minutes while guests waited in line for a free seat. Today around 9:30 all the bain-marie hot food dishes were empty for about 20 minutes. Plates with cold snacks (cold meats, cheeses, fruit…) also at the same time they were empty or almost empty. The staff did not replenish clean plates and cups on a regular basis. And at times they were missing. We had to ask for a refill because the staff didn't notice. It was similar with coffee machines. It was necessary to ask for more grains or milk to be added. The ladies who passed by didn't notice that anything was wrong. My request to speak to a manager was ignored because it's normal that sometimes something is missing. Yesterday at breakfast the situation looked a little better. The wait time for refilling cups, plates, and food was shorter, but still too long compared to other hotels. And it was necessary to ask the staff to replenish it, because they did not see the missing items.
The food was average.
Another downside is the very low water pressure in the shower. It takes an incredibly long time to rinse shampoo or conditioner out of your hair.
The building is showing its age and needs some refreshing.
Compared to the Radisson Blu hotels in Gdańsk and Kraków, this hotel is poor.

The food at the restaurant is delicious, but it's missing something that would make me leave feeling like it was a culinary experience.
I was a little bothered by the shower. It is too economical, so you don't get a satisfactory shower.
Otherwise, just an average hotel that won't impress, but thanks to the brand you can be sure that you won't be disappointed.

Another visit to this hotel and another unpleasant situation with incompetent reception staff. A deposit is charged which the lady at the reception simply forgot about. Despite asking twice, the woman simply acted as if she was in another world and did not know what was being said to her. When the deposit was finally returned, it seems to me that the room where my personal belongings were left, including my work phone, should have been checked first.
Shameful behavior for a 5-star hotel that no one informed me about finding it, as it turned out 10 minutes after my check-out that the phone had been left at the hotel so I could come back for it. Only late in the evening, when I was home, did I notice that I did not have my phone. I called the staff and asked if it had been found and that due to the incident with another guest, they simply "forgot to inform me". How can a hotel of this caliber and with accolades everywhere allow such situations to occur in 2026? Every visit there is the same problem with the young people at the reception. Does anyone managing the facility know about this?

title: Beautiful hotel and facilities, but unfortunately the service and staff attitude were far below the standards expected f
pos_text: Platinum Palace Boutique Hotel & SPA is a very elegant and well-maintained hotel, with spacious rooms and a pleasant atmosphere. The location is also convenient, allowing easy access to the city center within a few minutes. The SPA is definitely a valuable addition for guests looking to relax.

Unfortunately, the experience was affected by several issues that I did not expect from a hotel of this standard. The staff did not seem adequately trained for a 5-star hotel and, at times, appeared not prepared to manage a luxury property. My room was not cleaned properly during the stay, it was left untidy, and I felt poorly treated when I reported the issue.

I appreciated that the management eventually agreed to a partial refund through Booking.com, but I still believe the compensation was not fully proportionate to the inconvenience experienced. Overall, the hotel has excellent potential thanks to the structure and facilities, but the level of service and guest care needs significant improvement to truly meet 5-star expectations.

As for the location (as before) I maintain that it is simply wonderful. The hotel's glory days are long gone, but the bedding is clean, the beds are comfortable, and the staff is very nice and helpful. I came back really happy. I can certainly recommend such a stay to anyone. Additionally, the restaurant of the same name honors a 10% discount based on a business card issued by the hotel - and the cuisine is excellent. In short - if Wrocław, this is where it is.
